messages.content:
中译英：我在金融业担任要职期间，曾参与反收购项目、带领哈尔滨绿运农产品有限公司在深圳前海上新四板。
服务医疗行业期间，牵头落地哈尔滨医科大学附属一、二、三、四医院的业务对接，年均产能千万。成功组建了13个省会城市医疗办事处，在华腾组织的医疗企业座谈会中，多次代表华腾国内市场分享经验。带领团队对接谈判郑州政府部门和工会，为郑州8家企业进行基因检测，并荣登爱奇艺优酷等线上媒体。
在文娱行业期间，为各地政府文旅项目对接，曾以中国商业文化研究学会文化旅游分会副秘书长身份参加各地政府文旅局会议。成功与湖南卫视芒果台的精英卡通台建立合作关系，规划合作麦咭乐园。

During my tenure in the financial industry, I have participated in anti-acquisition projects and led Harbin Green Transport Agricultural Products Co., Ltd. to list on the New Fourth Board in Qianhai, Shenzhen.

In the service of the healthcare industry, I led the business docking of Harbin Medical University Affiliated Hospitals 1, 2, 3, and 4, with an annual production capacity of tens of millions. I successfully established 13 medical offices in provincial capital cities and represented Huateng's domestic market in sharing experiences at medical enterprise seminars organized by Huateng. I led a team to negotiate with government departments and labor unions in Zhengzhou, facilitating genetic testing for eight companies in Zhengzhou and gaining recognition from online media platforms such as iQiyi and Youku.

During my time in the entertainment industry, I facilitated the connection between government cultural tourism projects and served as the deputy secretary-general of the Cultural Tourism Branch of the Chinese Society for Business Culture Research, representing them in various government meetings. I successfully established a cooperative relationship with Hunan TV Mango TV's elite cartoon channel and planned the cooperative Maikai Amusement Park.

润色如下内容：During my tenure in the financial industry, I have participated in anti-acquisition projects and led Harbin Green Transport Agricultural Products Co., Ltd. to list on the New Fourth Board in Qianhai, Shenzhen.

In the service of the healthcare industry, I led the business docking of Harbin Medical University Affiliated Hospitals 1, 2, 3, and 4, with an annual production capacity of tens of millions. I successfully established 13 medical offices in provincial capital cities and represented Huateng’s domestic market in sharing experiences at medical enterprise seminars organized by Huateng. I led a team to negotiate with government departments and labor unions in Zhengzhou, facilitating genetic testing for eight companies in Zhengzhou and gaining recognition from online media platforms such as iQiyi and Youku.

During my time in the entertainment industry, I facilitated the connection between government cultural tourism projects and served as the deputy secretary-general of the Cultural Tourism Branch of the Chinese Society for Business Culture Research, representing them in various government meetings. I successfully established a cooperative relationship with Hunan TV Mango TV’s elite cartoon channel and planned the cooperative Maikai Amusement Park.

During my tenure in the financial industry, I actively participated in anti-acquisition projects and successfully led Harbin Green Transport Agricultural Products Co., Ltd. to list on the New Fourth Board in Qianhai, Shenzhen.

While serving the healthcare industry, I took the lead in facilitating business connections with Harbin Medical University Affiliated Hospitals 1, 2, 3, and 4, which collectively have an impressive annual production capacity of tens of millions. Additionally, I successfully established 13 medical offices in provincial capital cities and had the honor of representing Huateng in sharing our experiences at medical enterprise seminars organized by the company. Notably, I led a team in negotiating with government departments and labor unions in Zhengzhou, enabling genetic testing services for eight companies and garnering recognition from popular online media platforms such as iQiyi and Youku.

During my involvement in the entertainment industry, my main focus was on facilitating partnerships between government cultural tourism projects and various stakeholders. I proudly served as the deputy secretary-general of the Cultural Tourism Branch of the Chinese Society for Business Culture Research, and I actively represented our organization in numerous government meetings. An achievement worth mentioning is successfully establishing a fruitful collaboration with Hunan TV Mango TV’s esteemed cartoon channel, which paved the way for a comprehensive plan for the cooperative development of the Maikai Amusement Park.

压缩至100words以内：During my tenure in the financial industry, I actively participated in anti-acquisition projects and successfully led Harbin Green Transport Agricultural Products Co., Ltd. to list on the New Fourth Board in Qianhai, Shenzhen.

While serving the healthcare industry, I took the lead in facilitating business connections with Harbin Medical University Affiliated Hospitals 1, 2, 3, and 4, which collectively have an impressive annual production capacity of tens of millions. Additionally, I successfully established 13 medical offices in provincial capital cities and had the honor of representing Huateng in sharing our experiences at medical enterprise seminars organized by the company. Notably, I led a team in negotiating with government departments and labor unions in Zhengzhou, enabling genetic testing services for eight companies and garnering recognition from popular online media platforms such as iQiyi and Youku.

During my involvement in the entertainment industry, my main focus was on facilitating partnerships between government cultural tourism projects and various stakeholders. I proudly served as the deputy secretary-general of the Cultural Tourism Branch of the Chinese Society for Business Culture Research, and I actively represented our organization in numerous government meetings. An achievement worth mentioning is successfully establishing a fruitful collaboration with Hunan TV Mango TV’s esteemed cartoon channel, which paved the way for a comprehensive plan for the cooperative development of the Maikai Amusement Park

During my tenure in finance, I led Harbin Green Transport Agricultural Products Co., Ltd. to list on the New Fourth Board in Shenzhen. In healthcare, I facilitated connections with Harbin Medical University Affiliated Hospitals and established 13 medical offices. I represented Huateng at medical enterprise seminars and negotiated genetic testing services for 8 Zhengzhou companies. In entertainment, I served as deputy secretary-general of the Cultural Tourism Branch of the Chinese Society for Business Culture Research and established collaboration with Hunan TV Mango TV's cartoon channel for Maikai Amusement Park.
中译英：我在金融、医疗、文娱行业均有多个成熟的项目推进经验，以及相关的资源，作为一名商业咨询专业人士，我具备出色的市场分析和商业策略思维，精通行业知识和研究方法，擅长协调资源和人力，能够为香港的企业提供定制化的商业咨询服务，促进香港的商业发展和经济繁荣。

I have extensive experience in project management in the finance, healthcare, and entertainment industries, along with the necessary resources. As a business consulting professional, I excel in market analysis and strategic thinking, possess in-depth industry knowledge and research skills, and have a knack for coordinating resources and manpower. I am capable of providing customized business consulting services for companies in Hong Kong, contributing to their commercial development and economic prosperity.

润色如下内容：I have extensive experience in project management in the finance, healthcare, and entertainment industries, along with the necessary resources. As a business consulting professional, I excel in market analysis and strategic thinking, possess in-depth industry knowledge and research skills, and have a knack for coordinating resources and manpower. I am capable of providing customized business consulting services for companies in Hong Kong, contributing to their commercial development and economic prosperity.

With a wealth of experience in project management across the finance, healthcare, and entertainment sectors, I possess the necessary resources to drive successful initiatives. As a business consulting professional, I am skilled in market analysis and strategic thinking, combining in-depth industry knowledge with robust research capabilities. My expertise lies in resource and manpower coordination, enabling me to deliver tailored business consulting services to companies in Hong Kong. By doing so, I aim to make substantial contributions to their commercial development and foster economic prosperity within the region.

中译英：在我的数学和应用数学专业中，我表现出色，成绩一直排名班级前列，每年获得学院奖学金。在大学期间，我曾多次获得学校的“优秀学生”和“三好学生”荣誉称号，并被评为“优秀毕业生”。
除了学业成绩，我有7年绘画和4年的田径400米运动特长，还积极参加各种学术活动和竞赛，在其中取得了一定的成绩。例如，我曾参加过全国大学生数学竞赛，获得过二等奖的好成绩。此外，我还在数学建模竞赛和数据分析竞赛中获得了一些荣誉和奖项。

In my major of Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, I have consistently excelled, ranking among the top in my class and receiving college scholarships every year. Throughout my university years, I have been honored with the titles of "Outstanding Student" and "Three Good Student" multiple times, and was recognized as an "Outstanding Graduate."

In addition to my academic achievements, I have 7 years of experience in painting and 4 years of expertise in the 400m athletics event. I actively participate in various academic activities and competitions, achieving notable results. For example, I have participated in the National College Student Mathematics Competition and achieved a second-class award. Furthermore, I have also received honors and awards in mathematical modeling competitions and data analysis competitions.

润色如下内容：In my major of Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, I have consistently excelled, ranking among the top in my class and receiving college scholarships every year. Throughout my university years, I have been honored with the titles of “Outstanding Student” and “Three Good Student” multiple times, and was recognized as an “Outstanding Graduate.”

In addition to my academic achievements, I have 7 years of experience in painting and 4 years of expertise in the 400m athletics event. I actively participate in various academic activities and competitions, achieving notable results. For example, I have participated in the National College Student Mathematics Competition and achieved a second-class award. Furthermore, I have also received honors and awards in mathematical modeling competitions and data analysis competitions.

In my major of Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, I have consistently excelled, consistently ranking among the top in my class and receiving college scholarships every year. Throughout my university years, I have been honored with the titles of “Outstanding Student” and “Three Good Student” multiple times, and was recognized as an “Outstanding Graduate.”

In addition to my academic achievements, I am also passionate about painting, with 7 years of experience, and possess expertise in the 400m athletics event, having dedicated 4 years to it. I actively engage in various academic activities and competitions, consistently achieving notable results. For instance, I have proudly participated in the National College Student Mathematics Competition and was awarded a second-class award. Furthermore, I have garnered honors and awards in the fields of mathematical modeling competitions and data analysis competitions.

压缩至100words以内：In my major of Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, I have consistently excelled, consistently ranking among the top in my class and receiving college scholarships every year. Throughout my university years, I have been honored with the titles of “Outstanding Student” and “Three Good Student” multiple times, and was recognized as an “Outstanding Graduate.”

In addition to my academic achievements, I am also passionate about painting, with 7 years of experience, and possess expertise in the 400m athletics event, having dedicated 4 years to it. I actively engage in various academic activities and competitions, consistently achieving notable results. For instance, I have proudly participated in the National College Student Mathematics Competition and was awarded a second-class award. Furthermore, I have garnered honors and awards in the fields of mathematical modeling competitions and data analysis competitions.

In my Mathematics and Applied Mathematics program, I have consistently excelled, ranking among the top students and receiving annual scholarships. I have been recognized as an "Outstanding Student" and "Three Good Student" multiple times, and was honored as an "Outstanding Graduate" upon completion of my studies.

Beyond academics, I have a passion for painting and have 7 years of experience in this field. I also excel in the 400m athletics event, having devoted 4 years to honing my skills. I actively participate in various academic activities and competitions, consistently achieving notable results. Notably, I have received recognition in the National College Student Mathematics Competition, securing a second-class award. I have also earned accolades in mathematical modeling and data analysis competitions.
中译英：我对商业经营有深入了解，因此我计划在香港这样的国际商业中心发展自己的商业咨询事业，目前初步接触的公司有埃森哲、麦肯锡和普华永道。商业咨询行业是一个充满挑战和机遇的高端服务行业，通过深入了解香港市场需求和客户需求，制定有针对性的咨询计划和执行方案，并不断进行推广和服务跟踪和反馈，我相信我可以在香港这样的国际商业中心中开创出属于自己的咨询事业。

I have a profound understanding of business operations, which is why I plan to develop my own business consulting career in international business centers like Hong Kong. Currently, I have had preliminary contact with firms such as Accenture, McKinsey, and PwC. The business consulting industry is a high-end service sector filled with challenges and opportunities. By thoroughly understanding the market demand and client needs in Hong Kong, I aim to develop targeted consulting strategies and implementation plans. Through constant promotion, service tracking, and feedback, I strongly believe that I can establish my own successful consulting career in international business centers like Hong Kong.

润色如下内容：I have a profound understanding of business operations, which is why I plan to develop my own business consulting career in international business centers like Hong Kong. Currently, I have had preliminary contact with firms such as Accenture, McKinsey, and PwC. The business consulting industry is a high-end service sector filled with challenges and opportunities. By thoroughly understanding the market demand and client needs in Hong Kong, I aim to develop targeted consulting strategies and implementation plans. Through constant promotion, service tracking, and feedback, I strongly believe that I can establish my own successful consulting career in international business centers like Hong Kong.

With a deep understanding of business operations, I am set on establishing my own business consulting career in international business centers, specifically in Hong Kong. I have already made initial connections with prominent firms like Accenture, McKinsey, and PwC. The business consulting industry offers a challenging yet rewarding avenue of high-end services. By thoroughly comprehending the market demand and client requirements in Hong Kong, I aim to develop tailored consulting strategies and execution plans. Through consistent promotion, diligent service tracking, and valuable feedback, I am confident in my ability to forge a successful consulting career in renowned business hubs such as Hong Kong.
中译英：人力资源管理师证
HR Management Professional Certification
中译英：为了更好地复盘我多年的商务理论和实践的技术，迫切需要开拓开阔国际视野、根植本土实践的学习机会，计划10月份申请香港岭南大学的商业创新与创业理学硕士或11月的香港都会大学工商管理硕士。希望能通过所学知识和技能迅速提升自己的商业管理能力，并将其运用于到实际的经营活动当中

In order to gain a deeper understanding of business theories and practices, I am eagerly seeking opportunities to broaden my international perspective while grounding my learning in local practices. Therefore, I am planning to apply for the Master of Science in Business Innovation and Entrepreneurship program at Lingnan University in Hong Kong in October, or the Master of Business Administration program at The University of Hong Kong in November. I hope to quickly enhance my business management abilities through the knowledge and skills I acquire, and to apply them effectively in practical business operations.

润色如下内容：In order to gain a deeper understanding of business theories and practices, I am eagerly seeking opportunities to broaden my international perspective while grounding my learning in local practices. Therefore, I am planning to apply for the Master of Science in Business Innovation and Entrepreneurship program at Lingnan University in Hong Kong in October, or the Master of Business Administration program at The University of Hong Kong in November. I hope to quickly enhance my business management abilities through the knowledge and skills I acquire, and to apply them effectively in practical business operations.

In order to enhance my understanding of business theories and practices, I am actively pursuing opportunities to broaden my international perspective while integrating local knowledge and experiences. With this in mind, I plan to apply for the Master of Science in Business Innovation and Entrepreneurship program at Lingnan University in Hong Kong in October, or the Master of Business Administration program at The University of Hong Kong in November.
